content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.80%, Bank Nifty -1.10%, VIX +1.58% to 18.59 — broad tape under pressure with rate-sensitives leading down. However, individual earnings winners (ADANIPORTS, BHEL, HAL, SOBHA, BANDHANBNK, VEDL) are bucking the trend on strong Q4 prints. Book is 48% deployed with multiple positions sitting on small gains; priority is trailing SL on winners and protecting capital, not adding cluster risk on day where index breadth is negative.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24140
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.6% unrealized; SL at 1029 already locks in ~+4.6% gain (well above breakeven). CMP 1040.70, SL 1029 sits ~1.1% below CMP — meets the 1% trail-gap floor. Thesis intact (Q4 PAT +19%, ICICI Sec TP 1350). Holding stored levels — emitting HOLD instead since values unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1029 is already a profitable trail (+4.6% locked). CMP 1040.70 gives 1.1% gap to SL. No-op MODIFY would be wasted — stored SL/target are correct. Holding into target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.6%; SL at 119 is 2.2% below CMP 121.60. MACD bearish crossover near-term but structural thesis (gold ETF inflows, geopolitics, INR weakness) intact. Letting SL do its work — no change to levels. This is effectively HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8% unrealized at CMP 1725.80. Existing SL 1710 already locks small gain (+0.6%) and sits 0.9% below CMP — trail-gap is borderline (target ≥1.0%). Keeping stored SL since tightening further would breach trail-gap rule. No-op — emitting HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.4% at CMP 13449. SL 13400 sits just 0.4% below CMP — already tight. Stock recovered today (+1.0%) on April record sales and Rs 140 dividend. Letting SL absorb noise; if 13400 trips, exit is clean. No SL adjustment justified — would either loosen or breach trail-gap."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.5%; CMP 204.75, SL 204.00 — only 0.4% gap. Q4 results strong (PAT +68%) and stock at 52w high zone. Bank Nifty weakness drags. SL is essentially at the line — letting market decide. Tightening would breach 1% trail-gap rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1% at CMP 4627.50. SL 4555 is 1.6% below CMP — within trail-gap rules. Defence theme + new CMD + Rs 2,312 cr Coast Guard order intact. Position not yet at +2% to mandate breakeven trail. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.6% at CMP 379.35. SL 372 is 1.9% below CMP. Q4 PAT +154% YoY, 5y breakout, but P/E 224x is stretched. Letting SL handle risk; thesis (capex/infra theme, Rs 2.4L cr order book) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5% at CMP 1472.30. Q4 results released TODAY: PAT +124%, revenue +60%, Rs 6 dividend, FY26 pre-sales record Rs 8,140 cr. Stock opened +9.5% high 1577 then faded — gap-up exhaustion typical post-earnings. SL 1420 is 3.6% below CMP, within risk budget. Thesis dramatically reinforced by today's print."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.6% at CMP 6847.50. Q4 strong (PAT +130%, EBITDA margin doubled to 32.6%), Chemours commissioning June/July. 7.7x volume surge today on muted price = institutional accumulation read intact. SL 6650 is 2.9% below CMP, within budget. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already held — no second entry. P/E 224x and +62% one-month rally argue against adding."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "VEDL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock just hit 52-week high 305.90 then faded to 296.70 (-3% off intraday high). Demerger creates near-term price-discovery uncertainty (T+2 ex-demerger settlement still in progress). Listing of new entities June-Aug — best to wait for clean post-demerger structure rather than chase a +9% gap into noisy corporate action."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CEMPRO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "20% upper circuit yesterday + +12% today on 14.6x volume = parabolic extension after the result. Faded from intraday high 954.60 to 913.50 (-4.3% off high) signals exhaustion. No dividend FY26 vs Rs 2 prior. Better entry on a multi-day consolidation; chasing the gap-up is poor R:R."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Same-name re-entry cooldown: BAJFINANCE was exited Day-10 (5/4) at +₹199 due to over-tight trailing SL. Rule requires 5 trading sessions OR a new post-exit catalyst. Q4 results (Apr 29) were already public at the time of prior trade; no new catalyst since exit. Wait."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Sentiment NEUTRAL per research. Revenue growth 11% trails KFin 19%; stock +7.47% today is recovery from post-Q4 weakness, not a fresh thesis. P/E 40x with TER compression risk. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+14.15% gap-up — chasing earnings gaps without consolidation is poor R:R. Pass for today; revisit if it bases above gap."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATATECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.45% earnings gap. Same issue as other gappers — wait for base. IT sub-sector neutral today."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1029 already locks +4.6%. CMP 1040.70 gives 1.1% gap — meeting trail-gap floor. Tightening further would breach 1.0% rule. Target 1110 still in play; ICICI Sec TP 1350 supports."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 119 is 2.2% below CMP 121.60 — appropriate gap. Position -2.6% but thesis (geopolitics, INR weakness, ETF flows) intact. Letting SL handle risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1710 already 0.6% above entry (locked gain) and 0.9% below CMP — at the trail-gap boundary. Stock at 52w high; do not tighten further or risk noise stop-out. Target 1820 in play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 13400 is the line in the sand — 0.4% below CMP and well-placed below recent swing low. April record sales + Rs 140 dividend support thesis. If SL trips, clean exit at -2.9% from entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 204 is 0.4% below CMP. Bank Nifty weakness pressuring; if SL trips, clean exit at -2.4%. Q4 PAT +68% thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, not yet at +2% mandate. SL 4555 is 1.6% below CMP, well-placed. Defence theme strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.6%, SL 372 is 1.9% below CMP. Q4 PAT +154% but P/E 224x and parabolic 1-month rally argue caution. Letting SL manage."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 released today: PAT +124%, dividend Rs 6, record pre-sales. Gap-up to 1577 then faded to 1472 — typical post-earnings exhaustion. SL 1420 is 3.6% below CMP, within risk budget. Thesis materially reinforced."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 EBITDA margin doubled to 32.6%, Chemours catalyst June/July. 7.7x volume on muted price = accumulation read. SL 6650 is 2.9% below CMP."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "VEDL — wait for post-demerger price discovery (June-Aug listings of new entities) before entering. CEMPRO — needs multi-day consolidation above 900 before fresh entry; chasing 14.6x volume gap is poor R:R. BAJFINANCE — re-evaluate after 5-session cooldown if a fresh post-exit catalyst emerges. LALPATHLAB & TATATECH — watch for base-build above gap; not chasing earnings gaps.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 48% deployed across 9 CNC names — diversified across NBFC, gold ETF, ports, auto, banking, defence, capital goods, realty, chemicals. No single sector concentrated. Three positions (PNBHOUSING, ADANIPORTS, BANDHANBNK, MARUTI) have SLs already very close to CMP (0.4-1.1% gap) — these are effectively binary today: either they hold support and continue, or they stop out cleanly with predefined risk. SOBHA and NAVINFLUOR have wider SLs reflecting their strong fundamental catalysts (today's Q4 print). Refusing to chase 6 different gap-up earnings winners (BHEL added, but VEDL, CEMPRO, LALPATHLAB, TATATECH, WOCKPHARMA, HFCL passed) — cluster discipline holding. Daily P&L +0.25%, well within loss limit."
}
